landing.heroTitle: Turn every blunder into your next training plan.
landing.heroText: BlunderLab reviews your games, explains mistakes in plain language, detects recurring patterns, and gives you one clear goal for the next match.
landing.problemTitle: Engine feedback tells you the move. BlunderLab tells you the habit.
landing.problemQuote: I lost, but I still do not know what I should learn.
landing.problemEngine: Typical review: a red mark, a best move, and no next step.
landing.problemBlunderLab: BlunderLab: three moments, one recurring pattern, one training goal.
landing.howTitle: A simple loop after every game.
landing.stepPlayText: Start a quick game against Stockfish and save the full PGN.
landing.stepReviewText: Stockfish finds the moments where the evaluation changed.
landing.stepPatternText: The AI Coach maps each mistake to one of eight thinking patterns.
landing.stepTrainText: You leave with one clear goal and a daily puzzle from your own games.
landing.previewTitle: Built around the critical moment, not a generic board.
landing.previewCoach: You attacked, but the position first needed defense. Check the opponent's strongest reply before continuing your plan.
landing.previewGoalText: Before every forcing move, scan the opponent's immediate threat.
landing.taxonomyTitle: Eight patterns that explain how beginners actually lose.
landing.taxonomyText: Engine analysis tells you what was wrong. BlunderLab tells you which thinking habit caused it.
landing.dashboardTitle: Your dashboard tracks weaknesses, streak, Daily Blunder, and city rank.
landing.dailyTitle: Yesterday you missed this fork. Can you find it today?
landing.dailyText: Daily Blunder turns your old mistake into a personal puzzle.
landing.pricingTitle: Free proves the loop. Pro unlocks depth.
landing.demoTitle: See the learning loop before you play.
landing.demoText: A compact preview of the path BlunderLab is built around: play, review the critical moment, carry one goal into the next game.
landing.finalText: Play one game, let the coach explain the critical moments, then take one goal into the next match.
landing.heroSignalB: Daily Blunder from your own games
landing.demoComing: Play, review, understand the pattern, then train the next habit.
landing.trustedHeading: Built with the chess players, coaches, and builders we already train with
landing.patternsHelper: Each tag is a thinking habit, not a chess move.

patterns.Missed Tactic: A forcing line was on the board.
patterns.King Safety: You weakened your king or ignored a mating threat.
patterns.Tunnel Vision: You focused on your plan and missed the reply.
patterns.Greedy Move: You grabbed material and lost the position.
patterns.Time Panic: The move looks like it was made too fast.
patterns.Endgame Technique: A more precise endgame method existed.

pro.title: Upgrade when you want deeper training modes.
pro.text: Free proves the learning loop, Pro expands it with Pattern Drill, Deep Review, Goal Focus, and full mistake history. School opens the mentor use case.

builders.heroTitle: Pattern recognition is your superpower. Train it on chess.
builders.heroText: BlunderLab turns chess mistakes into a practical loop for builders: spot patterns, make decisions under pressure, review the failure, and carry one concrete improvement into the next attempt.
builders.coachText: You did not just miss a move. You committed too early to one plan and skipped the opponent's strongest reply. That is the same review habit builders need when debugging product decisions.
builders.goalText: Before every forcing move, pause for one counterexample: what is the strongest reply against my plan?

patterns.title: Recognize patterns faster
patterns.text: Blunder categories turn raw mistakes into named habits you can notice earlier next time.

pressure.title: Decide under pressure
pressure.text: Short games force tradeoffs, but the review teaches you which checks you skipped.

iteration.title: Review, then iterate
iteration.text: Every game ends with one next action, not a vague feeling that you should improve.

builders.ctaTitle: Use chess as a decision-making gym.
builders.ctaText: Play one game, review the critical moment, and bring a sharper thinking habit into the next game.

auth.signInText: Keep your reviews, unlock the dashboard, and turn past mistakes into daily training.
auth.guestFailed: Could not start guest session. Try again.
auth.onboardingText: Your level controls the default Stockfish opponent. Your city is only used for the local improvers leaderboard.
auth.signInHeroText: Sign in to keep your reviews, dashboards, and Daily Blunder history. The coach picks up where you left off.
auth.magicLinkSent: Magic link sent to {email}. Open it on this device to finish sign-in.
auth.authCallbackFailed: The sign-in link could not be verified. Try again.
auth.authRequired: Sign in with Google or email to open this area.
auth.onboardingError: Check your display name, level, and city before continuing.
auth.settingsHint: You can change these later in Settings.

beginner.label: Beginner
beginner.description: I know the rules and play casually.

intermediate.label: Intermediate
intermediate.description: I spot tactics and know basic openings.

advanced.label: Advanced
advanced.description: I play seriously and want sharper diagnostics.

footer.tagline: BlunderLab is the AI chess coach that turns every blunder into a personal training plan. Built for the nFactorial Incubator 2026 cohort.

errors.notFoundTitle: This line is not on the board.
errors.notFoundText: The page does not exist or may have moved.
errors.errorText: Retry the screen. If it repeats, use the landing page and start a fresh review.

dashboard.title: Your chess thinking, week by week.
dashboard.trendDescription: Critical moments grouped into rolling 7-day windows.
dashboard.trendEmpty: Play and review a few games. Your recurring patterns will surface here.
dashboard.recentReviewsDescription: The fastest way back into your learning loop.
dashboard.openReview: Open the review to continue training.
dashboard.noReviews: No reviews yet. Finish a game and run your first AI Coach review.
dashboard.activeGoalDescription: The next game should test one better habit.
dashboard.noGoal: Run a review to create your first active goal.
dashboard.dailyDescription: One position per day from your own mistakes.
dashboard.dailyCompleted: Solved today. Come back tomorrow for the next position.
dashboard.dailyLocked: Review at least one game with a mistake to unlock this.
dashboard.needFiveGames: Review 5 games this week to enter the city leaderboard.
dashboard.weeklyWeaknessDescription: Current 7 days compared with the previous 7 days.
dashboard.needMoreGames: Need more reviewed games to compare. Current week: {current}, previous week: {previous}.
dashboard.topWeaknessThisWeek: Your top weakness this week is {category}.
dashboard.movedFromTo: It moved from {previous} to {current} per reviewed game.
dashboard.identityDescription: A lightweight label based on your review habit and patterns.
dashboard.headerText: Your week in chess thinking: what to do next, and how patterns are shifting.
dashboard.todayDailyBody: One position per day, generated from your own past mistakes. About a minute of focused thinking.
dashboard.todayGoalTitle: Carry one habit into the next game.
dashboard.todayGoalBody: Play your next game while keeping this single habit in focus. The review will tell you whether it stuck.
dashboard.todayClassicBody: Play a clean Stockfish game, then run review with the AI Coach to surface your patterns.
dashboard.dailyCompletedHint: Daily puzzle solved today, come back tomorrow for the next one.
dashboard.recentReviewsTitle: Pick up where you left off.

leaderboardPage.title: Top improvers, not top ratings.
leaderboardPage.updating: Leaderboard is updating. The latest snapshot is older than 25 hours.
leaderboardPage.enter: Review 5 games this week to enter the {city} leaderboard.
leaderboardPage.noSnapshot: No snapshot yet. Run the cron job to seed the board.
leaderboardPage.empty: No eligible players yet. The board needs users with at least 5 reviewed games in the last 7 days.

settingsPage.title: Profile and defaults.
settingsPage.formError: Check the form values and try again.
settingsPage.trainingProfileDescription: City changes affect the default leaderboard filter.
settingsPage.accountDescription: Sign out keeps your saved games. Delete marks the profile as inactive for this prototype.
settingsPage.deleteText: This signs you out and marks the profile inactive for the prototype. Saved games stay in storage for now.

dailyPage.title: One old mistake. One better move.
dailyPage.emptyText: Daily Blunder unlocks after you have at least one reviewed mistake or blunder. Play a game, run review, then come back here.

dailyTrainer.answerDescription: Submit the best move, not the move you actually played.

trainingModes.title: Pick the kind of thinking you want to train.
trainingModes.classicDescription: Play a clean Stockfish game and review it after the result.
trainingModes.goalLockedDescription: Finish a review to carry one concrete goal into the next game.
trainingModes.dailyDescription: Solve one position from your own past mistakes.
trainingModes.patternDescription: Practice short drills generated from repeated mistake types.
trainingModes.deepDescription: Unlock deeper coach explanations and longer mistake history.
trainingModes.builderDescription: Train pattern recognition and decisions under pressure.

play.title: Play against Stockfish
play.setupTitle: Choose the mode before the board opens.
play.setupText: Start a normal Stockfish game or carry your latest review goal into a focused rematch. Other training surfaces live outside this board.
play.playReviewTitle: Play, then review the moments that matter.
play.classicDescription: A clean game against Stockfish, followed by review.
play.goalFocusDescription: Finish a review first, then bring one concrete habit into the next game.
play.difficultyDescription: Pick the engine strength for this game before starting.
play.productLoopDescription: The game is only step one. Review and progress live around it.
play.dashboardDescription: Return to progress, weakness, and identity.
play.dailyDescription: Train one position from past mistakes.
play.deepModesDescription: Pattern Drill and Deep Review are Pro surfaces.
play.goalHint: Carried from your latest review. Use this game to test one better habit.
play.statusDescription: This game feeds the review loop after you finish or resign.
play.persistenceOffline: Saving is paused — your moves stay on this device only.
play.reviewDescription: Engine analysis runs on the review screen. The AI Coach waits there.
play.moveHistoryDescription: Current PGN source for persistence and review.
play.firstMove: Make the first move as White.

review.noMoves: This game has no recorded moves yet. Finish a game in the play screen first.
review.title: Three moments that changed your game
review.fallback: AI Coach was offline, so explanations were rendered from local templates.
review.cleanDescription: The engine did not find any move that dropped your evaluation by 1.0 pawn or more.
review.cleanFallback: Stay sharp. The next game still has critical moments waiting.
review.limitText: Free tier allows a fixed number of reviews per day. Resets at {time}.
review.proLift: Pro membership will lift this cap.
review.nextGoalDescription: One concrete focus for your next match.

proPage.paymentsNote: Payments are not live in the submission prototype. This records upgrade intent for deeper training modes.
proPage.comparisonText: Pro is framed around learning depth, not cosmetic board changes.

pro.name: Pro
pro.description: For players who want focused training modes.
